command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "sudo systemctl status hermes-gateway --no-pager | head -6; sudo systemctl show hermes-gateway | grep EnvironmentFile; HPID=$(sudo systemctl show -p MainPID hermes-gateway | cut -d= -f2); echo PID=$HPID; sudo strings /proc/$HPID/environ 2>/dev/null | grep TELEGRAM"
